name: Ragnaraika Hunting Dance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蕾禍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ライカ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>首</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クビ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カリ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Budding Calamity Great Flower Head-Hunting Dance
desc: Target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of different Monster Types among the Link Monsters you control that are Insect, Plant, or Reptile; destroy them. If a face-up Insect, Plant, or Reptile monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Ragnaraika Hunting Dance" once per turn.
eff: Target cards your opponent controls, up to the number of different Monster Types among the Link Monsters you control that are Insect, Plant, or Reptile; destroy them. If a face-up Insect, Plant, or Reptile monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or card effect, while this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish this card, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can only use each effect of "Ragnaraika Hunting Dance" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
